title: Second Hand Vessels Continue to be Strongly Favored
section_path: Second Hand Vessels Continue to be Strongly Favored
section_path_text: Second Hand Vessels Continue to be Strongly Favored
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Despite dry bulk rates having set new multi-year highs this year, newbuilding orders have fortunately stayed at only a moderate level as owners have continued to significantly favor second hand vessel purchases. Most recently, last month saw only approximately 24 new dry bulk vessels ordered. In comparison, approximately 84 existing dry bulk vessels exchanged hands in the second hand market.
